translation.key: '%s' called for vote to kick you
'%s' called for vote to move '%s' to spectators (%s)
translation.value: '%s' 发起投票将 '%s' 移至旁观（%s）

translation.key: '%s' called vote to change server option '%s' (%s)
translation.value: '%s' 发起投票更改服务器选项 '%s'（%s）

translation.key: '%s' isn't an option on this server
Ammo-Pack tip: max 2 deployed. Allies (and you) can restock from them.
translation.value: 弹药包提示：最多同时放置 2 个，队友和你都可以从中补给。

translation.key: Anti-Air tip: hold fire for bursts; leave with Shift or /e.
translation.value: 防空炮提示：按住开火可连射，按 Shift 或输入 /e 离开。

translation.key: Anti-Tank tip: mouse wheel switches aim control / manual control. Exit: Shift or /e.
translation.value: 反坦克炮提示：滚轮切换瞄准控制/手动控制，按 Shift 或输入 /e 离开。

translation.key: Anti-Tank: mouse wheel switches aim / manual mode.
translation.value: 反坦克炮：滚轮切换瞄准/手动模式。

translation.key: C4 placed %i/3!. Press right-mouse to explode!
translation.value: 已放置 C4 %i/3！按鼠标右键引爆！

translation.key: C4 tip: max 3. Right-mouse detonates. Restock grenades at supply.
translation.value: C4 提示：最多 3 枚，鼠标右键引爆，可在补给站补充榴弹。

translation.key: Capture the enemy flag and return it to your base for big team score.
translation.value: 夺取敌方旗帜并带回己方基地，可获得大量队伍分数。

translation.key: Checkpoint tip: stand here to capture A/B/C. Your team gets score; enemies get a warning chat.
translation.value: 检查点提示：站在此处可占领 A/B/C。己方得分时，敌方会收到警告。
兵种（踩地图上的兵种地砖选择）：

translation.key: Emote or /e (Soldier): throw hand grenade. Space: fire water weapon.
translation.value: 表情键或 /e（士兵）：投掷手雷。空格：发射水下武器。

translation.key: Enemy vehicles need the matching key — even empty ones cannot be seized. Engineers can only damage occupied enemy vehicles. Exit: Shift or /e.
translation.value: 敌方载具需要对应钥匙，空车也无法夺取。工程师只能攻击有人驾驶的敌方载具。下车：Shift 或 /e。

translation.key: Engineer tip: Hammer places mines; Gun repairs vehicles and hacks enemy doors.
translation.value: 工程师提示：锤子放置地雷；手枪可修理己方载具，并破解敌方大门。

translation.key: Hand-Grenade fired, get an ammopack for new one!.
translation.value: 手雷已投出，拾取弹药包可再获得一枚！
无效的踢出客户端 ID
无效的移动客户端 ID

translation.key: Kick voting requires %d players on the server
translation.value: 踢人投票需要服务器上至少有 %d 名玩家

translation.key: Medic tip: Hammer fires heal shots; you slowly regenerate and can heal teammates.
translation.value: 医疗兵提示：锤子发射治疗弹；自身缓慢回血，也可治疗队友。

translation.key: Medic: heal shots. Sniper: rifle + stealth (Hammer toggles invis).
translation.value: 医疗兵：治疗弹。狙击手：步枪 + 隐身（锤子切换隐身）。

translation.key: Mine tip: max 3 active. Restock at supply stations.
translation.value: 地雷提示：最多同时存在 3 枚，可在补给站补充。
只允许 %d 名活跃玩家

translation.key: OpenBattle: team CTF + checkpoints. Pick a class tile first.
translation.value: OpenBattle：团队夺旗 + 检查点。请先踩兵种地砖选择兵种。

translation.key: Press shift or write /e to get out of the vehicles.
translation.value: 按 Shift 或输入 /e 可离开载具。

translation.key: Server does not allow voting to kick players
translation.value: 服务器不允许投票踢人

translation.key: Server does not allow voting to move players to spectators
translation.value: 服务器不允许投票将玩家移至旁观

translation.key: Shift or /e exits vehicles. Emote or /e throws a hand grenade (Soldier).
translation.value: Shift 或 /e 可离开载具。表情键或 /e 可投掷手雷（士兵）。

translation.key: Shift or /e: leave vehicle / cannon / fire smoke.
translation.value: Shift 或 /e：离开载具/炮台，或发射烟雾。

translation.key: Sniper tip: Hammer toggles invisibility; switch to Hammer to regenerate invis power.
translation.value: 狙击手提示：锤子切换隐身；切回锤子可恢复隐身能量。

translation.key: Soldier tip: Hammer deploys ammo packs; Grenade places C4; emote or /e throws a hand grenade.
translation.value: 士兵提示：锤子放置弹药包；榴弹放置 C4；表情键或 /e 投掷手雷。

translation.key: Soldier: C4 + ammo packs + hand grenade. Engineer: mines, repair, hack doors.
translation.value: 士兵：C4、弹药包、手雷。工程师：地雷、修车、破解敌门。

translation.key: Spectators aren't allowed to start a vote.
Stand on checkpoints A/B/C to capture them. Enemy doors: Engineer can hack.
translation.value: 站在检查点 A/B/C 上可占领。敌方大门可由工程师破解。

translation.key: Step on a class tile (Soldier/Engineer/Medic/Sniper) before fighting.
translation.value: 开战前请先踩兵种地砖（士兵/工程师/医疗兵/狙击手）。

translation.key: Teams must be balanced, please join other team
translation.value: 队伍需要平衡，请加入另一队

translation.key: The %s flag was captured by '%s' (%d.%s%d seconds)
This Mod based on the Idea of Battlefield.
This is the door of the enemys, you can't use it!
translation.value: 这是敌方大门，你无法使用！

translation.key: Time to wait before changing team: %02d:%02d
To far away from the station! Go back with your cursor!
translation.value: 离炮台太远了！请把光标移回去！

translation.key: Type /cmds for the full command list.
translation.value: 输入 /cmds 查看全部命令。
输入 /help 查看玩法说明。

translation.key: Type /help to learn classes, vehicles, and objectives.
translation.value: 输入 /help 了解兵种、载具与目标。

translation.key: Unknown help topic. Try: class, controls, vehicles, objectives.
Vehicle tip: press Shift or type /e to exit.
translation.value: 载具提示：按 Shift 或输入 /e 下车。

translation.key: Wait for current vote to end before calling a new one.
translation.value: 请等待当前投票结束后再发起新投票。

translation.key: Walk into a team vehicle to board. Heli/Tank can carry a passenger.
translation.value: 走进己方载具即可上车。直升机/坦克可搭载一名乘客。

translation.key: Water-Weapon = Arrows. Only usable in water. Press Spacebar to fire it.
translation.value: 水下武器 = 箭矢。仅在水中可用，按空格发射。

translation.key: Water-Weapon = Harpoon. Only usable in water. Press Spacebar to fire it.
translation.value: 水下武器 = 鱼叉。仅在水中可用，按空格发射。

translation.key: Water-Weapon = Throwing-Star. Only usable in water. Press Spacebar to fire it.
translation.value: 水下武器 = 飞镖。仅在水中可用，按空格发射。

translation.key: Welcome to OpenBattle — capture the flag and hold checkpoints A/B/C.
translation.value: 欢迎来到 OpenBattle — 夺旗并占领检查点 A/B/C。

translation.key: You are no longer invisible! Switch to Hammer to regenerate your Invispower.
translation.value: 你不再隐身！切换到锤子可恢复隐身能量。

translation.key: You can only give all 10 seconds ammo for yourself!
translation.value: 你只能每 10 秒为自己补充一次弹药！

translation.key: You don't have the key for this vehicle!
translation.value: 你没有这辆载具的钥匙！

translation.key: You got 5 sec God-Mod! Good job!
translation.value: 你获得 5 秒无敌！干得好！
你已经拥有该水下武器。

translation.key: You must wait %d seconds before making another vote
translation.value: 你必须再等待 %d 秒才能再次投票

translation.key: You still have no class. Step on a class tile (Soldier/Engineer/Medic/Sniper).
translation.value: 你还没有选择兵种。请踩兵种地砖（士兵/工程师/医疗兵/狙击手）。

translation.key: You were moved to %s due to team balancing

translation.value: 你的队伍尚未占领该检查点！
管理员强制执行服务器选项 '%s'（%s）
管理员将 '%s' 移至旁观（%s）

translation.key: entred Anti-Tank-Cannon, scroll to switch aim-type.
translation.value: 已进入反坦克炮，滚轮可切换瞄准模式。

translation.key: write /help for Infos about the Game
translation.value: 输入 /help 查看游戏说明
输入 /info 查看致谢与版本
输入 /info 获取更多信息
输入 /language <代码> 切换语言
